allow: Bash(sleep 30 && curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:8080/auth/login 2>&1 || echo "Backend not ready")

Bash(TOKEN="eyJhbGciOiJIUzM4NCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJ0ZXN0dXNlciIsImlhdCI6MTc3MzM2NTE3MSwiZXhwIjoxNzczMzY2OTcxfQ.4E0EMvV4UZW-y70Bsh9f64We7xP4y6P88eP8gA2ssij7olOJLet38sCUQrpmNqm5"

echo "=== CREATE POST ==="
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8080/posts \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \\
  -d '{"title":"Hello World","content":"This is my first post!"}'

echo -e "\\n\\n=== GET ALL POSTS ==="
curl -s http://localhost:8080/posts -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN"

echo -e "\\n\\n=== GET POST 1 ==="
curl -s http://localhost:8080/posts/1 -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN"

echo -e "\\n\\n=== UPDATE POST 1 ==="
curl -s -X PUT http://localhost:8080/posts/1 \\
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" \\
  -d '{"title":"Updated Title","content":"Updated content"}'

echo -e "\\n\\n=== GET MEMBER 1 ==="
curl -s http://localhost:8080/members/1 -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN"

echo -e "\\n\\n=== GET ALL MEMBERS ==="
curl -s http://localhost:8080/members -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8080/actuator/shutdown 2>/dev/null; pkill -f "spring-boot:run" 2>/dev/null; pkill -f "backend-practice" 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:8080/ 2>&1 || echo "Backend stopped")
Bash(pkill -f "BackendPracticeApplication" 2>/dev/null; pkill -9 -f "spring-boot" 2>/dev/null; sleep 3; curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:8080/ 2>&1 || echo "stopped")
Bash(kill -9 11452 2>/dev/null; taskkill //PID 11452 //F 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:8080/ 2>&1 || echo "stopped")
